name: Register two point clouds with ICP plane-to-plane
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcregistericp with planeToPlane metric as the default starting point
prompt: I have two point clouds saved as PCD files. Show me how to register them and visualize the result.
expected_output: Code using pcregistericp with Metric='planeToPlane' and pcshowpair for visualization. It should not use rigid3d or default point-to-point metric.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcregistericp for registration
Uses planeToPlane metric as the recommended default
Uses pcshowpair for visualization
Does not use legacy rigid3d for transformations

name: Register point clouds using NDT
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcregisterndt with a gridStep parameter tuned for the scale of the scene
prompt: I want to register two point clouds using NDT. How do I do that?
expected_output: Code using pcregisterndt with a gridStep parameter. Should use rigidtform3d for transformations, not rigid3d.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcregisterndt for registration
Specifies a gridStep parameter
Uses pcshowpair for visualization
Does not use legacy rigid3d

name: Register organized point clouds using LOAM
description: Tests that the skill guides toward LOAM with feature detection for organized point clouds
prompt: I have a sequence of point clouds from a Velodyne sensor. How do I register them using LOAM?
expected_output: Code using detectLOAMFeatures for feature extraction, downsampleLessPlanar for feature downsampling, and pcregisterloam for registration.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses detectLOAMFeatures for feature extraction
Uses downsampleLessPlanar for feature downsampling
Uses pcregisterloam for registration
Does not use rigid3d for transformations

name: Register ground data point clouds using phase correlation
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcregistercorr for ground data registration when no initial transformation is available
prompt: I have aerial lidar scans of ground terrain with no initial alignment estimate. How do I register them?
expected_output: Code using pcregistercorr for phase correlation-based registration. Should mention it is specifically designed for ground data.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcregistercorr for phase correlation registration
Mentions that pcregistercorr is designed for ground data
assertions.expected: Explanation that phase correlation is suited for ground data

name: Register significantly misaligned point clouds using global-to-local refinement
description: Tests that the skill guides toward FGR for global alignment followed by ICP for local refinement when point clouds have low overlap
prompt: I have two point clouds that are far apart. How do I register them accurately?
expected_output: Code using pcregisterfgr for global alignment, then pcregistericp with planeToPlane for local refinement. Should apply global transformation before local registration.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcregisterfgr for global registration
Uses pcregistericp for local refinement
Uses pctransform to apply the global transformation before local refinement
Applies global registration first, then local refinement as a two-step process
assertions.expected: pcregisterfgr called before pcregistericp, with pctransform applied between them

name: Register deformable point clouds using CPD
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcregistercpd with Nonrigid transformation for deformable registration
prompt: I have two point clouds of a deformable object. The object has changed shape between scans. How do I register the point clouds?
expected_output: Code using pcregistercpd with Transform='Nonrigid'. Should mention that CPD is the only option for non-rigid registration.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcregistercpd for registration
Uses Nonrigid transformation type
Mentions that CPD with Nonrigid is the only option for deformable registration
assertions.expected: Explanation that pcregistercpd with Nonrigid is the only deformable/non-rigid registration approach

name: Register point clouds using FPFH feature matching
description: Tests that the skill guides toward FPFH feature extraction, matching, and geometric transformation estimation for global registration
prompt: I want to register two point clouds using feature matching with FPFH descriptors.
expected_output: Code using extractFPFHFeatures, pcmatchfeatures, and estgeotform3d. Should downsample before feature extraction and use the rigid transformation type.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses extractFPFHFeatures for feature extraction
Uses pcmatchfeatures for feature matching
Uses estgeotform3d for transformation estimation
Downsamples point clouds before feature extraction

name: Compare registration algorithm accuracy using RMSE
description: Tests that the skill guides toward using the RMSE output of registration functions to compare algorithm accuracy, and notes that pcregisterfgr RMSE is not directly comparable
prompt: Which registration algorithm is more accurate for my data?
expected_output: Code that runs multiple registration functions, captures the rmse output from each, and compares them. Should note that pcregisterfgr RMSE is not comparable to other functions because it only measures inlier points.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Captures the rmse output from registration functions
Uses pcregistericp as one of the algorithms to compare
Notes that pcregisterfgr rmse is not directly comparable to other registration functions
assertions.expected: Comment or note that pcregisterfgr RMSE only measures inlier points and is not comparable

assertions.description: Compares multiple algorithms by their RMSE values to determine best result
assertions.expected: At least two registration functions called with RMSE output captured and compared

name: Organize unorganized point clouds for LOAM registration
description: Tests that the skill guides toward using pcorganize when point clouds are unorganized but lidar parameters are available, enabling LOAM registration
prompt: I have unorganized point clouds but I know the lidar sensor parameters. Can I still use LOAM for registration?
expected_output: Code using pcorganize to convert unorganized point clouds to organized format, then code using detectLOAMFeatures and pcregisterloam.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcorganize to organize the point cloud
Uses detectLOAMFeatures after organizing
Uses pcregisterloam for registration

name: Preprocess point clouds before registration
description: Tests that the skill guides toward cylindrical filtering and grid-based downsampling as preprocessing steps
prompt: Add preprocessing steps to improve registration
expected_output: Code using findPointsInCylinder for cylindrical filtering and pcdownsample with gridNearest or gridAverage. Should not recommend ground removal as a first step.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses findPointsInCylinder for ego vehicle and distance filtering
Uses pcdownsample for downsampling
Uses gridAverage or gridNearest method for downsampling, not random
assertions.expected: gridAverage or gridNearest passed to pcdownsample

assertions.description: Does not recommend ground removal as a default preprocessing step
assertions.expected: No segmentGroundSMRF or pcfitplane as a default step; may mention it as optional

name: Preserve organized structure when filtering with select
description: Tests that the skill guides toward using OutputSize='full' when filtering organized point clouds with select
prompt: I have an organized point cloud from a Velodyne sensor. I want to remove points within 3 meters of the sensor using findPointsInCylinder and then register with LOAM.
expected_output: Code using select with OutputSize='full' to preserve the organized structure after filtering with findPointsInCylinder.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses select to filter the point cloud
Uses findPointsInCylinder for ego vehicle filtering
OutputSize is set to 'full' not 'default'

name: Combine a sequence of registered point clouds into a map
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcalign for combining multiple registered point clouds rather than pcmerge or pccat
prompt: I registered a sequence of point clouds and I have the transformation for each point cloud. How do I combine them into a point cloud map?
expected_output: Code using pcalign with the array of point clouds, transformations, and a grid step. Should not use pcmerge in a loop or pccat for this use case.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcalign for combining multiple point clouds
Passes a grid step parameter to pcalign for downsampling duplicates
assertions.expected: gridStep or numeric third argument to pcalign

assertions.description: Does not use pcmerge in a loop for combining multiple point clouds
Does not use pccat as a first choice

name: Use the Point Cloud Registration Analyzer app for interactive comparison
description: Tests that the skill guides toward the pointCloudRegistrationAnalyzer app when the user wants to interactively compare registration algorithms
prompt: Is there an interactive tool for point cloud registration?
expected_output: Recommends the Point Cloud Registration Analyzer app launched with pointCloudRegistrationAnalyzer. Should mention it supports ICP, NDT, LOAM, FGR, Phase Correlation, and CPD.

assertions.description: Mentions the pointCloudRegistrationAnalyzer app
Mentions multiple supported algorithms
assertions.expected: Lists ICP, NDT, LOAM, FGR, Phase Correlation, and CPD as supported algorithms

assertions.description: Mentions the app provides preprocessing, comparison, and export capabilities
assertions.expected: Mentions preprocessing, side-by-side comparison, and export to workspace

name: Build an incremental map from a sequence of lidar scans
description: Tests that the skill guides toward correct pose accumulation using rigidtform3d with the premultiply convention and uses pcalign to combine the results
prompt: I have a folder of PCD files from a lidar sensor. How do I build a 3-D map?
expected_output: Code that loops through point clouds, registers each to the previous using pcregistericp, accumulates absolute poses using tforms(i-1).A * relTform.A, and combines them using pcalign. Should use InitialTransform for constant velocity assumption.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Accumulates poses correctly using premultiply convention: previous_absolute.A * relative.A
assertions.expected: tforms(i-1).A * relTform.A or absTform.A * relTform.A (absolute before relative)

assertions.description: Uses pcalign to combine the registered point clouds
Sets InitialTransform for registration using constant velocity assumption
Does not use legacy rigid3d

name: Build a map using LOAM with pcmaploam
description: Tests that the skill guides toward pcmaploam for refining LOAM registration over a sequence of organized point clouds
prompt: I have a sequence of organized point clouds and I want to build a map using LOAM.
expected_output: Code using detectLOAMFeatures, downsampleLessPlanar, pcregisterloam for pairwise registration, pcmaploam, and findPose/addPoints for map refinement.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses detectLOAMFeatures for feature extraction
Uses pcmaploam for map management
Uses findPose for map-refined pose estimation
Uses addPoints to add feature points to the map
